title: [CODEREVIEW] t_deck_puck.conf missing LVGL sub-config selects
description: lichen/apps/puck/boards/t_deck_esp32s3_procpu.conf:25 - CONFIG_LVGL=y added but no CONFIG_LV_FONT_* or CONFIG_LV_USE_KEYPAD; LVGL UI will fail to render text/input. Discovered during post-edit review pass 1.
close_reason: Added LVGL selects in conf after 3 passes
